name: client
context: Initialize and configure @supabase/supabase-js — the typed SDK for auth, database, storage, realtime, and functions
info: The @supabase/supabase-js SDK (v2) is the primary client for all Supabase services. A single `createClient()` call returns an object with `.auth`, `.from()`, `.storage`, `.channel()`, `.functions`, and `.rpc()` methods. Pass a `Database` generic from generated types for full type safety. For server-side rendering (Next.js, SvelteKit), use @supabase/ssr which manages cookies and provides `createServerClient()` and `createBrowserClient()` helpers. The client handles JWT refresh automatically, retries on transient failures, and multiplexes realtime subscriptions over a single WebSocket. Initialize once and reuse — do not create a new client per request.
triggers: set up supabase in my app

sections.title: Client initialization
sections.body: Call `createClient(url, anonKey)` once and reuse. Pass `Database` generic for type safety. For SSR frameworks, use `createServerClient()` from @supabase/ssr on the server and `createBrowserClient()` on the client. Never create a new client per request — the client manages JWT refresh and WebSocket connections internally.

sections.title: Server-side rendering
sections.body: Install @supabase/ssr alongside @supabase/supabase-js. Use `createServerClient()` with cookie adapters for server components and API routes. In Next.js middleware, use it to refresh sessions and protect routes. The SSR package handles cookie serialization, token refresh, and session persistence across server and client boundaries.

sections.title: Service role client
sections.body: Create a service role client with `SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY` to bypass [[supabase/rls]]. Set `autoRefreshToken: false` and `persistSession: false`. Use only in server-side code: API routes, edge functions, cron jobs, scripts. Never expose the service role key to the browser.

links.context: Generate TypeScript types for the typed client
RLS policies determine what the anon key can access
TypeScript types enable fully typed queries

related.note: CLI generates the Database type used by the typed client
RLS policies control what the anon key client can access
Next.js is the most common framework for @supabase/ssr
TypeScript is required for typed client usage

scripts.name: Create typed Supabase client

depends.reason: TypeScript is needed for full type safety with generated types
